news.t: The Clock Is Ticking to Benefit From CrowdStreet's QOZs
How a vaccine could upend real estate markets -- again

holdings.infoBox: REET is an equity ETF with a total of 380 individual holdings. The top holdings are Welltower stock at 7.96%, Prologis at 7.33%, Equinix at 5.96%, Simon Property Group at 3.81%, and Digital Realty Trust at 3.61%.

overview.description: The iShares Global REIT ETF (REET) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE EPRA Nareit Global REITs index, a global, market-cap-weighted index of firms involved in the ownership and operation of real estate. REET was launched on Jul 8, 2014 and is issued by BlackRock.
